data.description: Two police officers killed by bomb in Moscow near site of Russian general's killing Three people were killed by a bomb in Moscow on Wednesday after two police officers approached a man acting suspiciously near the site where a senior general was killed two days ago by a car bomb

data.description: On December 23, 2025, TNL Mediagene (listed as TNMG on Nasdaq), a digital media and data group headquartered in Tokyo, received notification from the Nasdaq Hearings Panel regarding a recent development.

data.title: Sanofi purchases Dynavax for $2.2 billion, enhancing adult vaccine portfolio with focus on hepatitis B and shingles.
data.description: Sanofi SA has entered into an agreement to purchase Dynavax Technologies Corporation for $15.50 per share in cash, totaling about $2.2 billion. This acquisition will enhance Sanofi's presence in adult immunization. Dynavax's key asset is the HEPLISAV-B adult hepatitis B vaccine, which is currently available in the U.S. The vaccine stands out due to its two-dose regimen within one month, providing rapid seroprotection compared to other vaccines that require three doses over six months. Additionally, the deal includes Dynavax's shingles vaccine candidate.

data.title: Kraken's IPO and M&A activity could fuel crypto's growth cycle, attracting significant traditional finance investments.
data.description: The upcoming IPO of Kraken and the increasing number of cryptocurrency companies pursuing public listings could potentially draw more traditional finance capital into the industry. This trend highlights the growing interest in cryptocurrencies and blockchain technology among investors. With Kraken’s IPO on the horizon and a surge in other crypto companies seeking public offerings, there is a significant opportunity for the industry to tap into mainstream financial markets. This move may facilitate greater integration between traditional finance and the burgeoning cryptocurrency sector, potentially signaling a shift towards wider acceptance and adoption of digital assets.

data.title: ActivatedYou by Maggie Q introduces Morning Lift - new organic instant coffee with mushrooms and superfoods. Boosts brain power, metabolism, gut health. Launched on Dec. 24, 2025.
data.description: Los Angeles, Dec. 24, 2025 – ActivatedYou® has introduced Morning Lift, an organic instant coffee blended with functional mushrooms and superfoods aimed at enhancing brain function, increasing metabolism, and improving gut health. This innovative product is designed to provide consumers with a convenient way to incorporate wellness-boosting ingredients into their daily routine. The coffee is certified organic and combines high-quality ingredients to offer a comprehensive health-boosting experience. Morning Lift is now available to consumers seeking to elevate their cognitive function, metabolic rate, and digestive well-being.

data.title: Ed Yardeni predicts AI benefits more companies beyond 'Magnificent 7,' highlighting 493 of S&P 500. Tech giants' rivalry expected to decrease profit margins. YTD performance of Magnificent 7 stocks shared.
data.description: Ed Yardeni, president of Yardeni Research, believes that the era of dominance for the 'Magnificent 7' tech stocks is coming to an end as AI boom will start benefiting a broader range of companies, which he calls the 'Impressive 493'. Yardeni likened the previous tech landscape to the 'Game of Thrones', with the tech giants being 'seven independent kingdoms'. The rise of generative AI has broken down barriers, leading to intensified rivalry among tech companies and narrowing profit margins. The YTD performance of the Magnificent 7 stocks in 2025 are: Nvidia Corp. up 36.80%, Apple Inc. up 11.69%, Microsoft Corp. up 16.31%, Amazon.com Inc. up 5.41%, Alphabet Inc. Class A up 65.95%, Alphabet Inc. Class C up 65.60%, and Meta Platforms Inc. up 10.96%. The full article is available on Benzinga.com.
